sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
curr_seg = current_frame.segmentation
curr_nodes = curr_seg['nodes']
curr_white = [n for n in curr_nodes if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 12]
curr_purple = [n for n in curr_nodes if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] == 20]
curr_gray = [n for n in curr_nodes if n['color'] == 'G' and n['pixels'] == 12]
print("White:", curr_white[0]['boundary'][:4] if curr_white else "N/A")
print("Purple:", curr_purple[0]['boundary'][:4] if curr_purple else "N/A")
print("Gray:", curr_gray[0]['boundary'][:4] if curr_gray else "N/A")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
